info.description: A web font to load site-wide. Add it here, then reference its family name in the heading / body / mono font fields.

family.description: The exact CSS font-family name, e.g. 'Playfair Display' or 'IBM Plex Sans'.

url.description: A stylesheet URL that loads the font, e.g. a Google Fonts link: https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display&display=swap
